questionHtml:
A neutron is absorbed by a nucleus of uranium-235U92235. One possible outcome is the production of two nuclides, barium-144Ba56144 and krypton-89Kr3689.

How many neutrons are released in this reaction?

A.  0

B.  1

C.  2

D.  3
